prompt: Part 4 generation started with config: {"difficulty":"easy","count":5,"speechType":null,"industry":null}

あなたはTOEIC Part 4のテスト作成専門家で、1人のスピーカーによるモノローグ形式の英語リスニング問題の作成を専門としています。

TOEIC Part 4の形式:
- 1人による連続したスピーチ（30-60秒程度）
- スピーチ内容に関する3問の理解問題
- 各問題は4つの選択肢（A, B, C, D）
- 音声のみでスピーチと問題が読み上げられる

スピーチの特徴:
- 自然で実用的な英語のモノローグ
- 企業アナウンス、イベント案内、ラジオ放送など
- 明確な目的と構造がある内容
- 聞き手に情報を伝える、説明する、案内する

重要な指示:
- スピーカーの立場と目的を明確に設定
- 論理的で聞きやすい構成
- 指定された難易度に適した語彙と構文
- 質問の正解位置は指定された位置に必ず配置

難易度ガイドライン:
- Easy: シンプルな構文、基本的な語彙、明確な情報構造
- Medium: 標準的な構文、一般的なビジネス語彙、やや複雑な情報
- Hard: 複雑な構文、高度な語彙、詳細で複雑な情報

IMPORTANT: Return ONLY valid JSON in the exact format shown below. Do not include any other text, explanations, or markdown formatting.

応答は以下の形式のJSONで返してください:
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "適切な話者名（例: Announcer, Manager, Guide）",
      "role": "話者の役割（例: Company spokesperson, Event coordinator）",
      "gender": "male/female"
    },
    "text": "スピーチの完全な内容（5-8文程度）",
    "topic": "スピーチの主題"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "問題文",
      "options": ["選択肢A", "選択肢B", "選択肢C", "選択肢D"],
      "correct": "正解のテキスト（選択肢の中から1つ）",
      "correctPosition": "A/B/C/D",
      "explanation": "なぜその答えが正しいかの説明（日本語）",
      "questionType": "main_purpose/detail/inference/next_action/intended_audience"
    },
    // 同様に合計3問
  ]
}

【Speech Type】: Meeting summary or update (会議の要点や更新)
【Industry】: Construction (建設業)
【Difficulty】: easy
【Question Types】: intended_audience, detail, main_purpose
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=A, Question 2=D, Question 3=A

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect
- Match the question type specified for each question

あなたは英日翻訳の専門家です。TOEIC Part 4のスピーチと関連情報を日本語に翻訳してください。

重要:
- 自然で分かりやすい日本語に翻訳
- ビジネス用語は適切な日本語表現を使用
- 文脈を考慮した翻訳

Return ONLY valid JSON without any markdown formatting or explanations.

Translate the following Part 4 speech content to Japanese:

Speech Type: meeting_summary
Industry: construction
Speaker Role: Company spokesperson
Topic: Update on construction projects

Speech Text:
Good afternoon, everyone. I want to provide a quick update on our current construction projects. As of today, the new office building downtown is about 70% complete. We're on track to finish by the end of November, as scheduled. The team is working hard to ensure we meet all safety and quality standards. Additionally, the bridge renovation project has just started this week. We anticipate minimal disruption to traffic, as most work will occur at night. Please feel free to reach out if you have any questions or need further information.

Return the translations in this JSON format:
{
  "speechTypeTranslation": "スピーチタイプの日本語訳",
  "textTranslation": "スピーチ全文の日本語訳",
  "topicTranslation": "トピックの日本語訳"
}

Generate a TOEIC Part 4 speech with the following specifications:

【Speech Type】: Company voice announcement (IVR) (企業の音声案内メッセージ)
【Industry】: Real Estate (不動産)
【Difficulty】: easy
【Question Types】: main_purpose, main_purpose, main_purpose
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=A, Question 2=D, Question 3=D

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect

```json
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Announcer",
      "role": "Company spokesperson",
      "gender": "female"
    },
    "text": "Thank you for calling Greenfield Real Estate. Our office hours are Monday through Friday, from 9 AM to 5 PM. If you know the extension of the person you wish to reach, please enter it now. For inquiries about property listings, press 1. To speak with a customer service representative, press 2. For assistance with billing or payment issues, press 3. To hear these options again, press 0. We appreciate your call and look forward to assisting you.",
    "topic": "Company voice menu options for a real estate firm"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "What is the main purpose of this announcement?",
      "options": [
        "To provide information about office hours and menu options",
        "To advertise new properties",
        "To give details about a company event",
        "To recruit new agents"
      ],
      "correct": "To provide information about office hours and menu options",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "このアナウンスの目的は、会社の営業時間と電話メニューのオプションを提供することです。",
      "questionType": "main_purpose"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "What is the main purpose of this message?",
      "options": [
        "To schedule property showings",
        "To provide emergency contact information",
        "To explain the company’s history",
        "To guide callers through phone menu options"
      ],
      "correct": "To guide callers through phone menu options",
      "correctPosition": "D",
      "explanation": "メッセージは、電話のメニューオプションを案内することを目的としています。",
      "questionType": "main_purpose"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "What is the primary purpose of this announcement?",
      "options": [
        "To introduce new real estate agents",
        "To promote a special real estate offer",
        "To announce a change in office location",
        "To inform callers about contacting options and office hours"
      ],
      "correct": "To inform callers about contacting options and office hours",
      "correctPosition": "D",
      "explanation": "アナウンスの主な目的は、連絡方法と営業時間についての情報を提供することです。",
      "questionType": "main_purpose"
    }
  ]
}
```

Generate a TOEIC Part 4 speech with the following specifications:

【Speech Type】: Tour or facility guide (施設や観光地のガイド)
【Industry】: Construction (建設業)
【Difficulty】: easy
【Question Types】: next_action, detail, inference
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=A, Question 2=B, Question 3=A

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect
- Match the question type specified for each question

Return the response in the specified JSON format.

```json
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Guide",
      "role": "Construction site tour guide",
      "gender": "male"
    },
    "text": "Welcome to our construction site tour. My name is John, and I'll be guiding you today. First, we'll head to the main building where you'll see the foundation work in progress. Please stay within the marked paths for your safety. After that, we'll visit the section where the steel framework is being assembled. If you have any questions, feel free to ask at any time. Once we've completed the tour, there will be a short presentation about our green building initiatives in the conference room. We hope you find the tour informative and engaging.",
    "topic": "Guided tour of a construction site"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "What is the first stop on the tour?",
      "options": [
        "The main building",
        "The steel framework section",
        "The conference room",
        "The parking area"
      ],
      "correct": "The main building",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "ツアーの最初の目的地は、基礎工事が進行中のメインビルディングです。",
      "questionType": "next_action"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "What will be presented after the tour?",
      "options": [
        "Safety procedures",
        "Green building initiatives",
        "Construction techniques",
        "Project timeline"
      ],
      "correct": "Green building initiatives",
      "correctPosition": "B",
      "explanation": "ツアーの後に、会議室で行われるプレゼンテーションでは、グリーンビルディングの取り組みについて説明されます。",
      "questionType": "detail"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "Why are visitors asked to stay within marked paths?",
      "options": [
        "For their safety",
        "To avoid disturbing workers",
        "To not get lost",
        "To follow the guide"
      ],
      "correct": "For their safety",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "ガイドは訪問者の安全のため、指定された経路を歩くように指示しています。",
      "questionType": "inference"
    }
  ]
}
```

Translate the following Part 4 speech content to Japanese:

Speech Type: tour_guide
Industry: construction
Speaker Role: Construction site tour guide
Topic: Guided tour of a construction site

Speech Text:
Welcome to our construction site tour. My name is John, and I'll be guiding you today. First, we'll head to the main building where you'll see the foundation work in progress. Please stay within the marked paths for your safety. After that, we'll visit the section where the steel framework is being assembled. If you have any questions, feel free to ask at any time. Once we've completed the tour, there will be a short presentation about our green building initiatives in the conference room. We hope you find the tour informative and engaging.

あなたはTOEIC Part 4のテスト作成専門家で、1人のスピーカーによるモノローグ形式の英語リスニング問題の作成を専門としています。

TOEIC Part 4の形式:
- 1人による連続したスピーチ（30-60秒程度）
- スピーチ内容に関する3問の理解問題
- 各問題は4つの選択肢（A, B, C, D）
- 音声のみでスピーチと問題が読み上げられる

スピーチの特徴:
- 自然で実用的な英語のモノローグ
- 企業アナウンス、イベント案内、ラジオ放送など
- 明確な目的と構造がある内容
- 聞き手に情報を伝える、説明する、案内する

重要な指示:
- スピーカーの立場と目的を明確に設定
- 論理的で聞きやすい構成
- 指定された難易度に適した語彙と構文
- 質問の正解位置は指定された位置に必ず配置

難易度ガイドライン:
- Easy: シンプルな構文、基本的な語彙、明確な情報構造
- Medium: 標準的な構文、一般的なビジネス語彙、やや複雑な情報
- Hard: 複雑な構文、高度な語彙、詳細で複雑な情報

【Speech Type】: Company policy or procedure change (方針変更・社内通知)

      "name": "Announcer",
      "role": "Company spokesperson",

Starting next Monday, all employees will be required to use two-factor authentication to access the company network. This change aims to enhance the security of our data and protect sensitive information from unauthorized access. Instructions on how to set up two-factor authentication will be sent to your email by the end of today. Please make sure to complete the setup before the end of the week.   },

        "The introduction of remote work options."
      ],

      "correctPosition": "A",

      "questionType": "intended_audience"

    {
